title: Transcript Todo Extraction Report
description: Produced by closed-loop-transcript-todo-extractor after every SubagentStop. Captures deferred items promised in the subagent's output so they don't evaporate with the subagent's context.

subagent.description: Agent name that produced the transcript being scanned.

session_id.description: CC session ID passed through the SubagentStop hook payload.

items.description: Deferred items extracted. Empty array is a valid, expected result — not every subagent defers anything.

notes.description: Human-readable observations — ambiguous phrasing flagged, patterns the extractor wants to learn.

content.description: Imperative-mood description of the deferred action. 'Fix the broken XYZ test' not 'The XYZ test is broken'.

kind.description: Graduated-response tier (per .claude/rules/stewardship-ratchet.md) the extractor believes the item belongs to. 'suggestion' is a non-tier informational item — a nice-to-have that the subagent happened to mention.

confidence.description: How strongly the extractor asserts this is a real deferred item and not a rhetorical aside.

source_excerpt.description: Verbatim snippet of the subagent output the extractor interpreted — makes the extraction auditable.

related_files.description: File paths the extractor inferred are involved. Optional.
